basic_info.name: 李喆
basic_info.location: 杭州 · 杭州师范大学

skills.name: AI 编程与产品交付
skills.description: 用 Claude Code / Hermes Agent 制作个人站、学习产品和工具项目；GitHub 可验证提交与部署记录。

skills.name: Web 应用开发
skills.description: 交付 Next.js / TypeScript 静态站与学习工具：lizliz.xyz、Brain Rush、PEP Words。

skills.name: 内容与研究输出
skills.description: 在个人站持续发布 AI Agent、SaaS、跨境支付、教育选择、生产力系统等长文。

skills.name: 英语与学习产品
skills.description: 有英语口播、留学生论文/课程辅导、PEP 词汇工具与少儿算术/英语产品实践。

projects.name: lizliz.xyz — 个人站与内容中枢
projects.description: 公开文章、项目、GitHub 活动和 PDF 简历的个人站。
highlights: 文章覆盖 AI Agent、SaaS、支付、教育与生产力。

projects.name: Brain Rush / PEP Words — 学习产品实验
projects.description: 面向儿童算术与英语词汇学习的小型产品组合。
highlights: Brain Rush：限时算术、单词选择、句子补全、错题复盘。
PEP Words：查询、释义、收藏、导出、flashcards、quizzes。

projects.name: Bitcoin Whitepaper Chinese Translation 2025
projects.description: 《Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System》中译与中英对照网站。
highlights: 个人翻译，保留原文结构、图表、公式与 references。
已公开部署，源码在 GitHub 维护。

projects.name: 留学生论文/课程辅导与英语内容
projects.description: 提供论文结构、课程学习、表达逻辑与英语口语展示。
highlights: 辅导多伦多、杜伦等院校学生的论文与课程任务。
Bilibili 英语口播视频展示口语和表达能力。

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: AI accelerated due diligence for private equity firms.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Autodesk AI initiative: built a user-facing AI agent for ShotGrid.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Six develops AI agents to simplify daily tasks like ordering food, making reservations, and grocery shopping, acting as personal assistants.
highlights: When LangChain was the only existing framework and was still weak for this use case, wrote an in-house agent orchestration module to help the team iterate faster.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: At the time, Ditto was called Petkeley: a seed-stage product that gave everyone an AI pet and helped pets make friends for users. The first version did not work out; the company later pivoted to Ditto and raised $9M.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Pre-AI: 3RM was a Series A startup helping web3 teams streamline workflows with an automated Telegram CRM.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Pre-AI: Bambee is a Series C startup aiming to provide outsourced HR for small businesses. Working at a larger startup gave a firsthand look at how different teams work together, how to balance technical solutions with business goals, and what it takes to scale a fast-growing company.
highlights: Developed custom Nuxt components with BuilderIO, enabling the marketing team to independently update the website while maintaining consistent branding and performance.
Leveraged static site generation to cut load times by 50%, reduce FCP by 2–3s, and lower LCP by 9s for improved UX.
Optimized performance metrics, resulting in lower bounce rates, enhanced SEO, and reduced advertising expenditure.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Woshi is an early-stage SaaS startup building an offline experience marketplace. This experience taught me about starting a business, rapid prototyping, and fundraising, and got me interested in startups.
highlights: Built a Bubble demo and a landing page, receiving 100+ positive feedback in pilot testing.
Implemented the MVP using React and Node.js.
Participated in the McGill Dobson Cup fundraising competition.
